name: garmin-connect-health
description: Comprehensive Garmin Connect health data skill -- fetches sleep, HRV, stress, body battery, SpO2, VO2 Max, training status, race predictions and more
author: dw1161

env.name: GARMIN_EMAIL
env.description: Your Garmin Connect account email address. Can also be set via macOS Keychain or ~/.garmin_credentials file.

env.name: GARMIN_PASSWORD
env.description: Your Garmin Connect account password. Prefer macOS Keychain over this env var.

env.name: GARMIN_IS_CN
env.description: Set to 'true' to use Garmin Connect CN endpoint (connect.garmin.com.cn). For Chinese accounts or mainland China IPs.

env.name: GARMIN_DATA_DIR
env.description: Directory to store daily health JSON snapshots. Defaults to ~/.garmin_health/

env.name: GARMIN_TOKENSTORE
env.description: Directory to cache OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.garminconnect/
